MET Institute — Admissions & Student Information (Knowledge Base)

About MET Institute
MET Institute of Management offers postgraduate programs with industry-focused curriculum and placement support.

Programs Offered
- MMS (Master of Management Studies)
- PGDM (Post Graduate Diploma in Management)
- MCA (Master of Computer Applications)

Entrance Examinations
MAH-CET and national tests such as CAT, MAT, CMAT, and XAT are accepted for management programs.

Eligibility — MMS / PGDM
Graduation with minimum 50% marks. Valid entrance exam score required.

Eligibility — MCA
Graduation with mathematics at 10+2 or graduation level. MAH-MCA CET required for state quota.

MCA Program Fees
Total tuition for the MCA program is Rs. 1,20,000 per year for the full-time program. Scholarships may apply for merit holders.

MMS Program Fees
MMS fees vary by category. Contact admissions for the current fee structure.

Application Process
Step 1: Register on the MET admissions portal.
Step 2: Upload documents and entrance exam scorecard.
Step 3: Pay the application fee.
Step 4: Attend counselling if shortlisted.
Step 5: Confirm admission with fee payment.

Placements
MET provides placement assistance with corporate tie-ups and internship opportunities.

Contact Admissions
Email: admissions@met.edu | Phone: +91-22-0000-0000
